perks.summary: verify a ledger — Ledger-v2 cryptographic prev-chain recompute (tamper/transplant) + structural run-ledger integrity (SV-2)
external Go cold-verify anchor — the independent Go chain verifier reproduces verify_chain verdict-for-verdict over a corpus (P1-T04, SV-2)
concurrency/durability torture — N concurrent durable_append writers must serialize into ONE valid prev-hash chain, zero lost (P1-T09, SV-2)
crypto-shredding erasure drill (P1-T07) — destroy a DEK, chain still verifies, subject fields unrecoverable
Merkle-checkpoint drill (P1-T03) — window-bounded cold-verify + forged-checkpoint audit
